# Acknowledgment — Apache POI

The DOCX fixtures in this directory are borrowed from
[apache/poi](https://github.com/apache/poi)'s own test corpus, used here to
validate against real-world malformed and edge-case OOXML documents instead of
only synthetic ones.

- Upstream repo: <https://github.com/apache/poi>
- Upstream source path: `test-data/document/`
- License: Apache-2.0 — see `NOTICE` in this directory and the upstream
  [LICENSE](https://github.com/apache/poi/blob/trunk/legal/LICENSE)

Thanks to the Apache POI maintainers for keeping their fixtures public.

For per-file provenance and the role each fixture plays in our test suite,
see `tests/fixtures/external/README.md` at the repo root of this directory.
